zh.lifeSummary: 當Humberge de Limoges於從0930年到0940年出生在法國奧維時，她的父親Aimon Ier de Bourbon46歲，母親Aldesinde35歲。她和Guillaume d'Auvergne IV至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1017年在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德。

zh-hans.Gravelines,59273,Nord,Hauts-de-France,FR: 法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德格拉維林斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humberge de Limoges于从0930年到0940年出生在法国奧維时，她的父亲Aimon Ier de Bourbon46岁，母亲Aldesinde35岁。她和Guillaume d'Auvergne IV至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于大约1017年在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Limoges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Emile, Fernand, Gaston, Jacques, Monique, Muguette, Pierre, Rosaire.
French: habitational name from the city of Limoges and of several other places in the southwestern part of France.
History: Pierre Amand dit Jolicoeur and Limoges from Bordeaux in Gironde, France, married Catherine Grenier in Montreal, QC, in 1698.

en.lifeSummary: When Humberge de Limoges was born from 0930 to 0940, in Auvergne, France, her father, Aimon Ier de Bourbon, was 46 and her mother, Aldesinde, was 35. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Guillaume d'Auvergne IV. She died about 1017, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humberge de Limoges est née du 0930 au 0940, à Auvergne, France, son père, Aimon Ier de Bourbon, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Aldesinde, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Guillaume d'Auvergne IV. Elle est décédée environ 1017, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humberge de Limoges von 0930 bis 0940 in Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aimon Ier de Bourbon 46 und ihre Mutter Aldesinde 35. Sie hatte mit Guillaume d'Auvergne IV mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1017 in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humberge de Limoges è nata il da 0930 a 0940 nel Auvergne, Francia, sua padre, Aimon Ier de Bourbon, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Aldesinde, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Guillaume d'Auvergne IV. Morì circa 1017, nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.(Auvergne): フランスアウバーグン

ja.Auvergne, Aquitaine, France: フランスアウバーグン
ja.Bourbon, France: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルト
ja.Gravelines,59273,Nord,Hauts-de-France,FR: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードグラベラインス
ja.lifeSummary: Humberge de Limogesがから0930年まで0940年にフランスアウバーグンで生まれた時，父Aimon Ier de Bourbonは46歳，母Aldesindeは35歳であった。彼女はGuillaume d'Auvergne IVとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1017年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Humberge de Limoges(이)가 0930년 부터 0940년 까지 프랑스 오버그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aimon Ier de Bourbon(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aldesinde(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Guillaume d'Auvergne IV(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1017년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humberge de Limoges nasceu de 0930 a 0940, em Auvergne, França, seu pai, Aimon Ier de Bourbon, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Aldesinde, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Guillaume d'Auvergne IV. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1017, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humberge de Limoges родилась с 0930 по 0940 в местности аувиргн, Франция, её отцу по имени Aimon Ier de Bourbon было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Aldesinde, 35. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Guillaume d'Auvergne IV. Она умерла около 1017 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

sm.from 930 to 940–about 1017: mai le 0930 e o'o I le 0940–e tusa o le 1017
sm.from 930 to 940: mai le 0930 e o'o I le 0940

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humberge de Limoges nació desde 0930 hasta 0940, en Auvergne, Francia, su papá, Aimon Ier de Bourbon, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Aldesinde, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Guillaume d'Auvergne IV. Murió aproximadamente 1017, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
